verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Command implemented; Idempotent; Documented; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.command_evidence: bun scripts/boot-reattach.mjs reattach performs the full sequence in one command: envelope re-materialization, durable-plane rebind, ordered health-gated service startup, session re-exposure — exit 0 with a structured report (ok:true, all sections green, sessions>0).
gate_result.idempotency_evidence: The second invocation reports ok:true with already_attached:true and starts nothing — safe to run any time, including from the login unit.
gate_result.documentation_evidence: The engine documents its subcommands and the single-deliberate-command contract in its header; the published user unit documents installation and trigger semantics.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: The gate executes the real command twice against the live host.
gate_result.red_first: gates committed red with the re-attach engine and unit absent (4/4 files failing), green at HEAD (lane 12/12)

proof_summary: ARCHBP-098 is complete: one documented command performs the full re-attach — envelope, durable plane, ordered services, sessions — idempotently (second run no-ops with already_attached:true), proven by live double execution on the target host.
